gold_rationale: Cash booked ahead is a liability; passenger revenue is the recognized amount.

side_a.name: advance_ticket_sales
quotes: Travelers prepaid trips scheduled for later departure.
The liability builds as customers purchase travel for future periods.

side_b.name: passenger_revenue
quotes: Fares convert to earned income once a flight operates.
Revenue recognition occurs upon flight completion under our accounting policy.

gold_rationale: Booked demand vs recognized catering revenue.

side_a.name: catering_orders_booked
quotes: Banquet and large-party commitments taken for future dates ran well ahead of the prior year despite a choppier consumer backdrop.

side_b.name: catering_revenue
quotes: We recognize catering revenue when the event is held and the food has been delivered to the host location.

gold_rationale: Orders placed (demand) vs recognized net sales on shipment.

side_a.name: online_orders_placed
quotes: Shoppers submitted digital carts during the promotion.

side_b.name: net_sales_on_shipment
quotes: Recognition happens when merchandise leaves the warehouse.

gold_rationale: Orders booked vs invoiced commercial sales.

side_a.name: commercial_orders_booked
quotes: Repair shops committed to parts for scheduled jobs ahead.

side_b.name: commercial_sales_invoiced
quotes: Billing posts upon delivery to the professional account.

gold_rationale: Bookings of demand vs recorded sales.

side_a.name: reservations_booked
quotes: Diners held tables through our platform before arriving.

side_b.name: dine_in_sales_recorded
quotes: The register captures amounts at the moment guests pay.

gold_rationale: Backlog of committed orders vs recognized revenue.

side_a.name: customer_order_backlog
quotes: Unfilled appliance commitments stayed elevated at close.

side_b.name: revenue_on_delivery
quotes: Recognition follows install and handoff to the household.

gold_rationale: Reserved demand vs sales rung up.

side_a.name: orders_reserved_for_pickup
quotes: Buyers held items to collect later at the counter.

side_b.name: in_store_sales_rung_up
quotes: Checkout scanning marks the point of recognition.

gold_rationale: Forward demand vs current recognized revenue.

side_a.name: advance_bookings
quotes: Forward demand for next quarter ran ahead of last year.

side_b.name: current_period_passenger_revenue
quotes: Completed flights drive the amount earned this quarter.

side_a.name: loyalty_points_issued
quotes: Members accumulated rewards from their recent visits.

side_b.name: loyalty_breakage_income
quotes: Expired unredeemed balances flow to the income line.

gold_rationale: Two distinct oil benchmarks, not interchangeable.

rival.name: crude_oil_price
rival.quote: Global oil markets set the baseline cost of energy inputs.

side_a.name: brent_crude_price
quotes: The international seaborne oil marker set global pricing.
Brent averaged 82 dollars per barrel, up 9 percent from the prior quarter.

side_b.name: wti_crude_price
quotes: West Texas grade tracks landlocked American barrels.
WTI averaged 78 dollars per barrel over the same period, a wider spread than usual.

side_a.name: sofr
quotes: The secured overnight rate anchors floating bank debt.

side_b.name: federal_funds_rate
quotes: A policy target the central bank sets for reserves.

gold_rationale: Jet fuel vs crude: correlated but distinct inputs.

side_a.name: jet_fuel_price
quotes: Refined kerosene trades at a spread above the barrel.

side_b.name: crude_oil_price
quotes: Unrefined feedstock quoted before any processing step.

side_a.name: beef_commodity_cost
quotes: Cattle market swings drive this primary protein input.

side_b.name: chicken_commodity_cost
quotes: Poultry supply cycles move a separate menu ingredient.

side_a.name: treasury_yield_10_year
quotes: Long-dated government paper reflects distant expectations.

side_b.name: treasury_yield_2_year
quotes: Short maturities track near-term policy bets instead.

side_a.name: cpi_inflation
quotes: A fixed household basket gauges consumer price change.

side_b.name: pce_inflation
quotes: Shifting spending weights measure deflator movement.

gold_rationale: Market benchmark vs delivered all-in cost; related but distinct objects.

side_a.name: jet_fuel_spot_price
quotes: Gulf Coast kerosene benchmarks moved sharply higher during the quarter.

side_b.name: into_plane_fuel_cost
quotes: Our delivered cost per gallon, which layers airport fees and taxes onto the market price, rose more slowly.

gold_rationale: A pair rate vs a basket index.

side_a.name: euro_dollar_rate
quotes: European sourcing shifts with the single-currency cross.

side_b.name: broad_dollar_index
quotes: Overall import buying power follows a trade-weighted basket.

gold_rationale: Two coupled dairy benchmarks; correlated, not identical.

side_a.name: class_iii_milk_price
quotes: The federally posted dairy benchmark climbed through the period.

side_b.name: cheese_block_price
quotes: Spot cheddar traded on the exchange set what we pay for slices.

side_a.name: gift_card_liability
quotes: Unredeemed prepaid cards sit as an obligation on the books.
The balance grows through the holidays as cards are purchased faster than redeemed.

side_b.name: gift_card_revenue
quotes: Redemption and breakage turn cards into earned income.
Redemptions convert the liability into sales when customers shop.

gold_rationale: Deferred obligation vs recognized loyalty revenue.

side_a.name: deferred_loyalty_revenue
quotes: Points owed to members await future redemption events.

side_b.name: loyalty_revenue_recognized
quotes: Earned income posts as rewards are cashed or expire.

gold_rationale: Unearned ticket liability vs earned revenue.

side_a.name: air_traffic_liability
quotes: Amounts collected for travel not yet flown sit in the air traffic liability until passengers use their tickets.

side_b.name: passenger_revenue_earned
quotes: Passenger revenue is recognized when transportation is provided rather than when a booking is made.

gold_rationale: Deferred fee balance vs recognized income.

side_a.name: deferred_membership_fees
quotes: Prepaid program dues we have collected sit as an obligation until the coverage period is delivered.

side_b.name: membership_fee_income
quotes: Ratable recognition posts each month of the plan.

side_a.name: contract_liability
quotes: Consideration collected before performance sits deferred.

side_b.name: recognized_revenue
quotes: Satisfying an obligation moves the amount into income.

gold_rationale: Deferred miles vs recognized loyalty revenue.

side_a.name: loyalty_deferred_balance
quotes: Outstanding miles represent a duty owed to members.

side_b.name: loyalty_revenue
quotes: Redeeming those miles for travel books the income.

side_a.name: unearned_service_revenue
quotes: Prepaid installs not yet performed remain a liability.

side_b.name: service_revenue_recognized
quotes: Completing the work moves amounts to earned income.

gold_rationale: Deferred initial fee vs ongoing royalty.

side_a.name: deferred_franchise_fees
quotes: Upfront amounts spread across the multi-year agreement.

side_b.name: franchise_royalty_revenue
quotes: Ongoing income accrues as operator sales occur.

side_a.name: customer_deposits
quotes: Prepayments on special orders await the arrival of parts.

side_b.name: recognized_sales
quotes: Delivery of the ordered item books the transaction.

side_a.name: total_revenue
quotes: Every source across the company rolls into the top line.

side_b.name: beverage_revenue
quotes: Only drinks contribute to this narrow product slice.

side_a.name: total_operating_expenses
quotes: Salaries, upkeep, rent and more sum into the full cost.
The line includes salaries, landing fees, rent, maintenance and depreciation.

side_b.name: aircraft_maintenance_expense
quotes: Only fleet repair work lands in this narrower line.
Heavy checks and component repairs drive this narrower expense line.

side_a.name: merchandise_revenue
quotes: All product categories combine into one broad figure.

side_b.name: computing_revenue
quotes: Just laptops and tablets feed this single category.

gold_rationale: Total cost of sales (genus) vs freight (species).

side_a.name: cost_of_sales
quotes: Merchandise and freight together form the full amount.

side_b.name: freight_cost
quotes: Inbound transport alone makes up this narrow piece.

side_a.name: labor_and_related_expense
quotes: Wages, benefits and taxes combine into staffing cost.

side_b.name: payroll_tax_expense
quotes: Only the employer levy sits in this smaller line.

side_a.name: passenger_revenue
quotes: Fares plus onboard charges make up the broad figure.

side_b.name: seat_selection_revenue
quotes: Just the choose-your-seat fee feeds this narrow slice.

side_a.name: comparable_sales
quotes: Growth across every like-for-like channel is combined.

side_b.name: in_store_comparable_sales
quotes: Only physical locations feed this narrower measure.

side_a.name: food_and_beverage_costs
quotes: All ingredients and drinks together form the figure.

side_b.name: produce_cost
quotes: Just fresh vegetables and fruit sit in this line.

side_a.name: operating_revenue
quotes: Passengers, freight and other sources sum together.

side_b.name: cargo_revenue
quotes: Only hold freight contributes to this narrow amount.

gold_rationale: Market move (cause) vs the reported line (consequence).

side_a.name: fuel_price_spike
quotes: A sharp jump in the market rate pressured the quarter.
Spot prices jumped roughly 30 percent within the quarter before easing.

side_b.name: fuel_expense
quotes: The income statement line reflects reported cost burned.
Fuel expense rose 18 percent year over year on both price and volume.

side_a.name: wage_inflation
quotes: Persistent tightness in hourly hiring pushed starting wages up again across most trade areas.

side_b.name: labor_expense
quotes: Labor and related expenses grew faster than sales, pressuring restaurant margins.

side_a.name: severe_winter_storms
quotes: Bad weather kept many guests away from dining rooms.

side_b.name: comparable_sales_decline
quotes: The reported like-for-like figure fell versus last year.

side_a.name: policy_rate_hikes
quotes: The central bank lifted its target several times.

side_b.name: interest_expense
quotes: The reported cost of borrowings climbed accordingly.

side_a.name: commodity_cost_inflation
quotes: Pricier beef and dairy lifted the cost of ingredients.

side_b.name: margin_compression
quotes: Restaurant-level profitability narrowed as a result.

side_a.name: heavy_promotional_activity
quotes: Deep discounts were used to move slow-selling inventory.

side_b.name: gross_margin_decline
quotes: The reported profitability rate slipped year over year.

side_a.name: capacity_oversupply
quotes: Too many seats chased limited demand on key routes.
Industry seat growth ran 6 percent against demand growth of 3 percent.

side_b.name: unit_revenue_decline
quotes: Reported revenue per seat mile weakened accordingly.
Unit revenue declined 4 percent as fares weakened on oversupplied routes.

side_a.name: rapid_store_openings
quotes: An accelerated pipeline of new store openings widened our footprint across priority markets.

side_b.name: pre_opening_expense
quotes: Pre-opening costs, expensed as incurred before a location begins operating, rose with the development schedule.

side_a.name: port_and_freight_snarls
quotes: Shipping bottlenecks delayed inbound merchandise flow.

side_b.name: out_of_stock_levels
quotes: Empty shelves rose across several important categories.

side_a.name: company_operated_restaurant_sales
quotes: Locations we run directly generate these amounts.
Company-operated locations produced 2.1 billion dollars of sales.

side_b.name: franchised_restaurant_sales
quotes: Independently owned operators produce this figure.
Franchised locations produced 9.4 billion dollars of sales for operators.

side_a.name: company_operated_margin
quotes: Profitability at units we own and run directly.

side_b.name: franchise_margin
quotes: Royalty income net of operator support programs.

side_a.name: mainline_unit_cost
quotes: Aircraft we fly ourselves carry this per-seat figure.

side_b.name: regional_unit_cost
quotes: Capacity purchased from affiliates carries another.

side_a.name: company_owned_store_count
quotes: Outlets we operate ourselves make up this tally.

side_b.name: independent_dealer_count
quotes: Third-party owned resellers form a separate roster.

gold_rationale: Own-operated vs licensed-partner operations; different ownership classes.

side_a.name: company_operated_stores
quotes: Locations staffed and run by our own teams anchor the fleet.

side_b.name: licensed_store_locations
quotes: Shops operated inside partner retailers under license agreements expanded.

side_a.name: system_restaurant_count
quotes: Every unit, company and operator alike, is included.

side_b.name: company_restaurant_count
quotes: Only locations we run ourselves make this tally.

side_a.name: consolidated_venture_result
quotes: A controlled entity is folded fully into our figures.

side_b.name: equity_method_venture_result
quotes: A minority stake appears as one net investment line.

side_a.name: franchise_royalty_revenue
quotes: A slice of operator sales flows to us as fees.

side_b.name: company_sales_revenue
quotes: Locations we run book their own transactions instead.

side_a.name: company_distribution_centers
quotes: Warehouses we own and staff handle our flow.

side_b.name: third_party_logistics
quotes: Outsourced providers fulfill on a contract basis.

gold_rationale: Restaurant guest count vs retail foot-traffic.

side_a.name: traffic
quotes: Guest traffic softened mid-quarter before recovering as weather normalized across dining rooms.

side_b.name: traffic
quotes: Store traffic trends improved sequentially as shoppers responded to sharper opening price points.

gold_rationale: Airline seat capacity vs DC throughput capacity.

side_a.name: capacity
quotes: Capacity measures available seat miles across the fleet.

side_b.name: capacity
quotes: Capacity measures throughput across the distribution fleet.

side_a.name: yield
quotes: Yield measures revenue earned per passenger mile flown.
Yield strengthened as corporate travel returned to long-haul markets.

side_b.name: yield
quotes: Yield measures the dividend earned per share held.
The payout ratio held steady while the share price rose.

gold_rationale: Store unit vs airline per-ASM unit.

side_a.name: unit
quotes: A unit means one restaurant location in the count.

side_b.name: unit
quotes: A unit means one seat mile in the revenue rate.

side_a.name: comps
quotes: Comps means comparable-store sales at open stores.

side_b.name: comps
quotes: Comps means complimentary meals given to guests.

side_a.name: load_factor
quotes: Load factor gives the share of seats sold on flights.

side_b.name: utilization
quotes: Utilization gives the share of hours each aircraft flies.

side_a.name: cover
quotes: A cover means one guest served during a meal period.

side_b.name: coverage
quotes: Coverage means earnings measured against interest owed.

side_a.name: basket
quotes: The basket means average spend per shopping trip.

side_b.name: basket
quotes: The basket means the weighted mix of input costs.

gold_rationale: Average trip distance vs table-occupancy duration.

side_a.name: stage_length
quotes: Stage length gives the average miles flown per trip.

side_b.name: dwell_time
quotes: Dwell time gives the average minutes a party occupies its table.

gold_rationale: Menu mix vs cabin mix; same word, different objects.

side_a.name: mix
quotes: Mix reflects what guests ordered, as premium entrees displaced value items.

side_b.name: mix
quotes: Mix reflects the blend of premium cabin and main cabin seats sold.

gold_rationale: Gross system sales vs the company's own sales.

side_a.name: system_wide_sales
quotes: System-wide sales include franchised and company sales.

side_b.name: company_sales
quotes: Company sales include only the company-operated sales.

gold_rationale: Gross vs net of pass-through taxes.

side_a.name: gross_passenger_revenue
quotes: Gross passenger revenue is stated before taxes collected.

side_b.name: net_passenger_revenue
quotes: Net passenger revenue is stated after taxes remitted.

gold_rationale: GMV (gross) vs net revenue as agent.

side_a.name: gross_merchandise_value
quotes: Gross merchandise value counts all marketplace orders.
Marketplace volume reached 1.2 billion dollars across all sellers.

side_b.name: net_revenue
quotes: Net revenue counts only the commission we retain.
We recorded 180 million dollars of commission as our net share.

side_a.name: gross_sales
quotes: Gross sales are total sales before returns are removed.

side_b.name: net_sales
quotes: Net sales are total sales after returns are removed.

side_a.name: gross_margin
quotes: Gross margin is revenue left after ingredient cost.

side_b.name: operating_margin
quotes: Operating margin is revenue left after every cost.

gold_rationale: Gross bookings vs net recognized revenue.

side_a.name: gross_bookings
quotes: Gross bookings are fare amounts before refunds are removed.

side_b.name: net_revenue
quotes: Net revenue is fare amounts after refunds are removed.

gold_rationale: Gross margin dollars vs net margin ratio.

side_a.name: gross_margin_dollars
quotes: Gross margin dollars are revenue minus merchandise cost.

side_b.name: net_margin
quotes: Net margin is income shown as a percentage of revenue.

gold_rationale: Gross vs net of advertising-fund pass-through.

side_a.name: gross_franchise_revenue
quotes: Gross franchise revenue includes ad-fund amounts collected.

side_b.name: net_franchise_revenue
quotes: Net franchise revenue excludes ad-fund amounts collected.

side_a.name: gross_profit_margin
quotes: Gross profit margin is revenue after merchandise cost.

side_b.name: operating_margin
quotes: Operating margin is revenue after all store costs.

gold_rationale: Same line; one excludes items, one does not.

side_a.name: adjusted_operating_income
quotes: Adjusted operating income excludes restructuring charges.
On an adjusted basis, operating income rose 12 percent.

side_b.name: operating_income
quotes: Operating income includes those restructuring charges.
Including the charges, operating income declined 3 percent.

side_a.name: adjusted_operating_income
quotes: Adjusted operating income, which excludes costs of the store-closure program, is the measure management uses internally.

side_b.name: operating_income
quotes: Operating income as reported reflects all charges recorded in the period.

gold_rationale: Adjusted EPS removes an item; GAAP EPS does not.

side_a.name: adjusted_diluted_eps
quotes: Adjusted diluted EPS excludes a legal settlement charge.

side_b.name: diluted_eps
quotes: Diluted EPS includes the legal settlement charge in full.

side_a.name: adjusted_pre_tax_income
quotes: Adjusted pre-tax income excludes special mark-to-market items.

side_b.name: pre_tax_income
quotes: Pre-tax income includes those special mark-to-market items.

side_a.name: adjusted_gross_margin
quotes: Adjusted gross margin excludes purchase-accounting amounts.

side_b.name: gross_margin
quotes: Gross margin includes those purchase-accounting amounts.

gold_rationale: 'Core' non-GAAP variant vs the GAAP margin.

side_a.name: adjusted_operating_margin
quotes: Adjusted operating margin excludes non-representative items.

side_b.name: operating_margin
quotes: Operating margin includes every item under the rules.

gold_rationale: Ex-fuel adjusted cost vs all-in reported cost.

side_a.name: adjusted_unit_cost
quotes: Adjusted unit cost excludes fuel and special charges.

side_b.name: reported_unit_cost
quotes: Reported unit cost includes fuel and special charges.

gold_rationale: Adjusted excludes an item; GAAP includes it.

side_a.name: adjusted_net_income
quotes: Adjusted net income excludes a one-time pension charge.

side_b.name: net_income
quotes: Net income includes the one-time pension charge in full.

gold_rationale: Non-GAAP expense vs the GAAP expense line.

side_a.name: adjusted_sga
quotes: Adjusted SG&A excludes transformation and severance costs.

side_b.name: sga_expense
quotes: SG&A expense includes transformation and severance costs.

gold_rationale: One brand's segment result vs the total.

side_a.name: division_operating_profit
quotes: Division operating profit reflects one brand's restaurants.
The division delivered another quarter of profitable growth.

side_b.name: consolidated_operating_profit
quotes: Consolidated operating profit reflects all brands combined.
Consolidated results include every brand plus corporate costs.

side_a.name: mainline_operating_revenue
quotes: Mainline revenue reflects flying performed by our own aircraft and crews.

side_b.name: consolidated_operating_revenue
quotes: Consolidated results also fold in capacity purchased from regional partners under fixed-fee arrangements.

side_a.name: services_segment_revenue
quotes: Services segment revenue reflects memberships and repair.

side_b.name: total_revenue
quotes: Total revenue reflects products and services combined.

side_a.name: brand_segment_sales
quotes: Brand segment sales reflect one division's performance.

side_b.name: total_company_sales
quotes: Total company sales reflect all divisions together.

side_a.name: domestic_segment_revenue
quotes: Domestic segment revenue reflects United States stores.

side_b.name: consolidated_revenue
quotes: Consolidated revenue reflects domestic and overseas stores.

side_a.name: cargo_segment_revenue
quotes: Cargo segment revenue reflects freight operations only.

side_b.name: total_operating_revenue
quotes: Total operating revenue reflects passenger and freight.

side_a.name: company_restaurant_segment_margin
quotes: Company-restaurant segment margin reflects operated units.

side_b.name: consolidated_operating_margin
quotes: Consolidated operating margin reflects franchise and corporate.

side_a.name: salon_services_revenue
quotes: Salon services revenue reflects in-store salon activity.

side_b.name: total_net_sales
quotes: Total net sales reflect merchandise and services company-wide.

gold_rationale: Regional segment cost vs consolidated cost.

side_a.name: regional_segment_cost
quotes: Regional segment cost reflects purchased affiliate flying.

side_b.name: consolidated_operating_cost
quotes: Consolidated operating cost reflects mainline and regional.

gold_rationale: A forward guide about the metric vs the realized metric; different flavors are never the same driver.

side_a.name: revenue_guidance
quotes: Management now expects full-year sales toward the high end of the prior range.

side_b.name: revenue
quotes: Sales recognized in the quarter reflected completed customer transactions.

side_a.name: operating_margin
quotes: Operating margin is profit over revenue after corporate.

side_b.name: restaurant_level_margin
quotes: Restaurant-level margin is profit over revenue before corporate.

side_a.name: operating_income
quotes: Operating income measures accrual profit from operations.

side_b.name: operating_cash_flow
quotes: Operating cash flow measures actual cash from operations.

side_a.name: same_store_sales_growth
quotes: Same-store sales growth compares against the prior year.
Against last year, comparable sales rose 2.5 percent.

side_b.name: sequential_sales_growth
quotes: Sequential sales growth compares against the prior quarter.
Against the prior quarter, sales rose 1.1 percent on seasonality.

gold_rationale: Deviation-vs-expectation flavor vs the base metric.

side_a.name: earnings_surprise
quotes: Results came in well ahead of the consensus the company had framed expectations against.

side_b.name: earnings
quotes: Reported profit for the period reflected operations as recorded.

side_a.name: reported_revenue
quotes: Reported revenue is measured at actual exchange rates.
Reported revenue grew 4 percent including currency headwinds.

side_b.name: constant_currency_revenue
quotes: Constant-currency revenue is measured at fixed rates.
In constant currency, growth was 7 percent.

side_a.name: unit_sales
quotes: Unit sales measure the count of items sold to buyers.

side_b.name: dollar_sales
quotes: Dollar sales measure the value of items sold to buyers.

side_a.name: ebitda_margin
quotes: EBITDA margin is earnings over revenue before charges.

side_b.name: net_margin
quotes: Net margin is earnings over revenue after all charges.

side_a.name: block_hours
quotes: Block hours measure time from gate push to gate arrival.

side_b.name: flight_hours
quotes: Flight hours measure time from wheels up to wheels down.

gold_rationale: Guide about comps vs realized comps; cross-flavor, never merged.

side_a.name: comparable_sales_guidance
quotes: The outlook calls for like-for-like growth to accelerate in the back half.

side_b.name: comparable_sales
quotes: Like-for-like growth in the quarter reflected traffic and ticket already realized.

gold_rationale: Normalized unit rate vs the aggregate.

rival.name: passenger_yield
rival.quote: Average fare earned for each mile a paying passenger flies.

side_a.name: revenue_per_available_seat_mile
quotes: Passenger revenue divided by seat miles gives this rate.

side_b.name: total_passenger_revenue
quotes: Passenger revenue summed across the network gives the total.

side_a.name: sales_per_square_foot
quotes: Net sales divided by selling area gives this productivity.
Productivity improved as smaller-format stores matured.

side_b.name: total_net_sales
quotes: Net sales summed across all stores gives the aggregate.
The aggregate grew with square footage and comp gains.

side_a.name: cost_per_available_seat_mile
quotes: Unit costs, measured against every seat mile we operate, remain the cleanest read on efficiency.

side_b.name: total_operating_cost
quotes: Total operating expense grew with flying, fuel and new labor agreements.

side_a.name: average_unit_volume
quotes: Restaurant sales divided by units gives this per-store rate.

side_b.name: total_restaurant_sales
quotes: Restaurant sales summed across units gives the total.

side_a.name: average_check
quotes: Restaurant sales divided by guests gives this per-guest amount.

side_b.name: total_restaurant_sales
quotes: Restaurant sales summed across guests gives the total.

gold_rationale: Two different denominators: per store vs per square foot.

side_a.name: sales_per_store
quotes: Total sales divided by store count gives this per-store rate.

side_b.name: sales_per_square_foot
quotes: Net sales divided by selling area gauges productivity of the box.

side_a.name: revenue_per_passenger
quotes: Passenger revenue divided by travelers gives this per-head rate.

side_b.name: revenue_per_passenger_mile
quotes: Fare revenue divided by miles flown by paying travelers gives another.

side_a.name: revenue_per_member
quotes: Total revenue divided by members gives this per-member rate.

side_b.name: total_revenue
quotes: Total revenue summed across the company gives the aggregate.

gold_rationale: Per-gallon price vs total fuel expense.

side_a.name: fuel_cost_per_gallon
quotes: Fuel spend divided by gallons gives this per-gallon price.
The per-gallon economics drive our hedging decisions.

side_b.name: total_fuel_expense
quotes: Fuel spend summed for the period gives the total expense.
Consumption and price together set the expense line.

side_a.name: net_sales
quotes: Net sales are company revenue after returns and allowances.

side_b.name: total_net_sales
quotes: Total net sales are company revenue after returns too.

gold_rationale: Singular vs plural of the same line.

side_a.name: total_revenue
quotes: Total revenue includes company sales and franchise royalties.

side_b.name: total_revenues
quotes: Total revenues include company sales and franchise royalties.

side_a.name: comparable_store_sales
quotes: Comparable store sales cover stores open at least one year.
Comparable store sales rose 4.6 percent in the quarter.

side_b.name: comparable_sales
quotes: Comparable sales cover stores open at least one year too.
Comparable sales rose 4.6 percent, led by commercial.

gold_rationale: Full name vs trade abbreviation of the same comparison metric.

side_a.name: same_store_sales
quotes: Same-store sales compare locations open in both periods.

side_b.name: comps
quotes: Comps compare results at restaurants open in both periods.

side_a.name: available_seat_miles
quotes: Available seat miles are seats flown times the miles flown.
We flew 72 billion available seat miles in the year.

side_b.name: asms
quotes: ASMs are seats flown times the miles flown, abbreviated.
ASMs totaled 72 billion, up modestly on gauge.

side_a.name: cost_per_available_seat_mile
quotes: Cost per available seat mile is operating cost per seat mile.

side_b.name: casm
quotes: CASM is operating cost per available seat mile, abbreviated.

side_a.name: gross_profit_margin
quotes: Gross profit margin is gross profit over revenue as a percent.

side_b.name: gross_margin
quotes: Gross margin is gross profit over revenue as a percent too.

gold_rationale: The same reusable driver stated by two different companies; cross-company convergence.

side_a.name: comparable_store_sales
quotes: Our like-for-like sales at stores open more than a year rose modestly.

side_b.name: comparable_store_sales
quotes: Sales at outlets operating for more than twelve months improved on stronger do-it-yourself demand.

side_a.name: average_unit_volume
quotes: Average unit volume is average annual sales per restaurant.

side_b.name: auv
quotes: AUV is average annual sales per restaurant, abbreviated.

gold_rationale: Spelling variant of the same metric.

side_a.name: system_wide_sales
quotes: System-wide sales include company and franchised locations.

side_b.name: systemwide_sales
quotes: Systemwide sales include company and franchised locations.

side_a.name: aircraft_fuel_expense
quotes: Aircraft fuel expense fell with market prices despite higher consumption.

side_b.name: fuel_expense
quotes: The fuel line declined as cheaper gallons offset increased flying.

side_a.name: selling_general_and_administrative_expenses
quotes: These expenses cover store payroll, advertising and overhead.
The line covers corporate overhead as well as store-level administration.

side_b.name: sga_expense
quotes: SG&A expense covers store payroll, advertising and overhead.
It includes advertising, occupancy support and payroll administration.

side_a.name: cost_of_goods_sold
quotes: Cost of goods sold covers merchandise and inbound freight.

side_b.name: cost_of_sales
quotes: Cost of sales covers merchandise and inbound freight too.

gold_rationale: Abbreviation vs spelled-out form of the same non-GAAP measure.

side_a.name: adjusted_ebitda
quotes: Adjusted EBITDA strips interest, taxes, depreciation, amortization and the named special items.

side_b.name: earnings_before_interest_taxes_depreciation_and_amortization_as_adjusted
quotes: The spelled-out measure applies the same exclusions in the same way.

side_a.name: same_restaurant_sales
quotes: Same-restaurant sales compare restaurants open in both periods.

side_b.name: comparable_restaurant_sales
quotes: Comparable restaurant sales compare restaurants open both periods.

side_a.name: average_check
quotes: The amount a typical party spends per visit rose on menu pricing.

side_b.name: average_ticket
quotes: Average ticket moved higher, with pricing more than offsetting lighter add-on attach.

side_a.name: average_check
quotes: How much a diner pays on a typical visit ticked higher.
Average spend rose to 19.40 dollars per guest.

side_b.name: average_spend_per_guest
quotes: Total receipts divided across patrons served edged upward.
Per-guest receipts averaged about 19.40 dollars.

gold_rationale: Within restaurants, both mean the same driver.

side_a.name: guest_counts
quotes: Guest counts improved for the first time in six quarters.

side_b.name: traffic
quotes: More diners came through our doors even as the industry stayed promotional.

gold_rationale: Same all-in staffing cost, different labels.

side_a.name: restaurant_labor_costs
quotes: Total pay and benefits for restaurant teams climbed with market wage moves.

side_b.name: payroll_and_benefits
quotes: Compensation for restaurant employees, all in, rose.

gold_rationale: Paper and packaging are the same component under two names.

side_a.name: food_and_paper_costs
quotes: Ingredient and packaging spend moved with commodity prices.

side_b.name: food_and_packaging_costs
quotes: What we spend on ingredients and disposables tracked input markets.

gold_rationale: Same input spend named by category vs by line.

side_a.name: ingredient_costs
quotes: Prices paid for core kitchen inputs pressured the quarter.

side_b.name: food_costs
quotes: What we pay for menu inputs weighed on results.

gold_rationale: Takeout and to-go are the same off-premise channel.

side_a.name: takeout_sales
quotes: Food packaged for guests to eat away from the restaurant drove growth.

side_b.name: to_go_sales
quotes: Orders prepared to be carried out rather than eaten on site rose.

gold_rationale: Same loss driver; jargon vs plain.

side_a.name: shrink
quotes: Shrink stepped up again, concentrated in high-theft categories.

side_b.name: inventory_shortage
quotes: Inventory shortage results worsened, reflecting losses discovered at physical counts.

side_a.name: aircraft_fuel
quotes: What our jets burned during the period cost more.
The fuel line is our second-largest operating expense.

side_b.name: jet_fuel_expense
quotes: The reported price of powering the fleet increased.
Only labor exceeds it among our operating costs.

side_a.name: membership_fee_income
quotes: Money earned from paid loyalty tiers grew this year.

side_b.name: loyalty_program_revenue
quotes: Subscriptions to our rewards plans brought in more.

gold_rationale: Net unit expansion under two names.

side_a.name: unit_growth
quotes: The count of restaurants, net of closures, expanded.

side_b.name: net_new_units
quotes: Locations added net of those we retired increased the footprint.

side_a.name: operating_margin
quotes: Profit as a share of revenue widened over the year.

side_b.name: return_on_sales
quotes: Operating profit per dollar of revenue improved on cost discipline.

side_a.name: checked_bag_fees
quotes: Charges travelers pay to check luggage added up.

side_b.name: baggage_fee_revenue
quotes: Income from stowed suitcase charges contributed.

side_a.name: gift_card_breakage
quotes: Value on prepaid cards never spent flowed to income.

side_b.name: unredeemed_card_income
quotes: Balances customers left behind boosted the top line.

side_a.name: comps
quotes: Growth at stores open a full year measured demand.

side_b.name: comparable_store_sales_growth
quotes: Like-for-like locations showed how underlying demand moved.

gold_rationale: Same digital-share-of-sales driver under two names.

side_a.name: ecommerce_penetration
quotes: The online share of what we sold kept rising.

side_b.name: digital_mix
quotes: How much of what we sold came through digital channels grew.

side_a.name: ancillary_revenue
quotes: Money beyond the base fare, from fees and extras, grew.
Ancillary items added 68 dollars per passenger on average.

side_b.name: non_ticket_revenue
quotes: Income unrelated to the seat itself contributed more.
Non-ticket sources contributed 68 dollars per traveler.

side_a.name: hourly_labor_cost
quotes: What we pay hourly team members across our restaurants increased.

side_b.name: crew_wages
quotes: Hourly pay for our restaurant team members went up.

gold_rationale: Co-extensive premises cost under two labels.

side_a.name: occupancy_expense
quotes: The cost of keeping store space open weighed in.

side_b.name: property_and_lease_costs
quotes: Rent, utilities and related charges for our locations rose.

gold_rationale: Spelled-out vs abbreviation of per-unit volume.

side_a.name: average_restaurant_sales_volume
quotes: Typical annual takings at one location edged up.

side_b.name: auv
quotes: Mean yearly sales per unit improved over the period.

side_a.name: fuel_surcharge
quotes: An add-on fee to recover pricier fuel was applied.

side_b.name: fuel_recovery_fee
quotes: A levy offsetting higher energy cost was charged.

gold_rationale: The same digital channel driver under two names.

side_a.name: digital_sales
quotes: Orders placed through the app and website climbed.

side_b.name: app_and_web_sales
quotes: Purchases made through our digital ordering channels rose.

gold_rationale: Same DIY customer segment, different label.

side_a.name: diy_sales
quotes: Purchases by walk-in consumers fixing their own cars grew.
Do-it-yourself customers shop the counter and shelves directly.

side_b.name: retail_customer_sales
quotes: Amounts from everyday shoppers at the counter rose.
Retail transactions exclude the professional installer business.

gold_rationale: Same time measure, named vs described.

side_a.name: block_hours
quotes: Time from leaving the gate to reaching the next added up.

side_b.name: gate_to_gate_time
quotes: The full taxi-and-fly duration per trip was tallied.

side_a.name: inventory_turns
quotes: How fast stock cycled through the stores improved.

side_b.name: inventory_turnover
quotes: The pace at which merchandise sold and refilled quickened.

gold_rationale: Private label and own brand are the same store-brand concept.

side_a.name: private_label_sales
quotes: Products sold under our own store brand gained share.

side_b.name: own_brand_sales
quotes: Merchandise carrying the house label outgrew national brands.

gold_rationale: Same per-ASM revenue metric, named vs described.

side_a.name: revenue_per_available_seat_mile
quotes: Fares earned for each seat carried a mile defined the rate.

side_b.name: unit_revenue
quotes: Passenger fares earned per mile of capacity set the figure.

gold_rationale: Same ongoing royalty driver, different words.

side_a.name: franchise_royalties
quotes: A percentage of operator sales flowed to us as fees.

side_b.name: franchise_fee_income
quotes: Payments tied to licensee turnover reached our books.

gold_rationale: Definitional identity: utilization is hours operated per aircraft per day.

side_a.name: daily_aircraft_utilization
quotes: Average hours each aircraft operates per day increased.

side_b.name: hours_flown_per_aircraft_per_day
quotes: The daily operating hours of a typical aircraft rose.

side_a.name: distribution_costs
quotes: Expenses to move parts from warehouses to stores grew.

side_b.name: logistics_expense
quotes: The cost of moving merchandise from distribution centers to stores rose.

gold_rationale: Same free-cash-flow driver, described vs named.

side_a.name: free_cash_flow
quotes: Cash from operations left after building assets improved.
We define it as operating cash flow less capital expenditures.

side_b.name: cash_generation_after_capex
quotes: Operating cash net of investment in property rose.
Cash after reinvestment funds dividends and buybacks.

side_a.name: on_time_performance
quotes: The share of flights arriving within schedule improved.

side_b.name: arrival_reliability
quotes: The share of arrivals landing on schedule strengthened.

side_a.name: conversion_rate
quotes: The share of visitors who bought something ticked up.

side_b.name: purchase_rate
quotes: How often a browser became a buyer improved.

side_a.name: beverage_attachment
quotes: How often diners added a drink to the order rose.
Attachment improved with combo pricing changes.

side_b.name: drink_incidence
quotes: The rate of beverages sold alongside meals climbed.
Incidence rose as bundles gained traction.

gold_rationale: Commercial and pro-customer are the same installer-sales channel.

side_a.name: commercial_sales
quotes: Sales to professional repair shops accelerated.

side_b.name: pro_customer_sales
quotes: Business from professional installer customers grew.
